description: Map of old risky GDD statements to QIKI Body v0.2.2 replacements.

items.old_claim: magnetic lock as structural bayonet lock
items.replacement: magnetic pre-align only; mechanical hard lock required

items.old_claim: RTG as normal battery / boost source
items.replacement: RTG-class heavy / trickle source, not boost-source
reactor-class source is external / station / sled / heavy infrastructure
baseline NBL is emergency low-rate only
constrained protection / deployable deflector, not absolute shield
field drive is not baseline; if used, it is Terta-exotic with explicit cost
RCS requires Thrust Map and Torque Map before balanced thrust can be claimed
module passport is mandatory for runtime-ready status

items.old_claim: ORION as decorative HUD / visual truth
items.replacement: ORION is evidence station with source / freshness / trust / reason_codes
